name: nullprobe
description: Deep-void probe that deploys living, self-updating procedural memory, principles, guardrails, and skills before every mission.

scripts.protocol:verify: rm -rf dist && npm run build && npm test
scripts.protocol:security: npm audit && grep -rn -e 'api[_-]key\s*=' -e 'secret\s*=' -e 'password\s*=' -e 'token\s*=' --include='*.ts' --include='*.js' --include='*.json' --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=dist --exclude-dir=.git . || true && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.protocol:cleanup: rm -rf dist coverage tsconfig.tsbuildinfo *.tgz /tmp/test-probe /tmp/test-cursor /tmp/test-antigravity /tmp/test-gemini && find . -name '.DS_Store' -not -path '*/.git/*' -delete && echo 'Cleanup complete.'
scripts.protocol:cleanup:dry: echo '=== DRY RUN ===' && echo 'dist/:' && ls dist/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'coverage/:' && ls coverage/ 2>/dev/null && echo '*.tgz:' && ls *.tgz 2>/dev/null && find . -name '.DS_Store' -not -path '*/.git/*' && echo '(dry run — nothing deleted)' || true
scripts.protocol:explore: echo 'Run protocols/exploration.md manually — web search steps require human or AI execution. See: npm run dev -- update'
